title: Crispy Australian Cashew Stir-fry
description: A nutty and dense dish featuring cashews, cinnamon stick, and a touch of steam to create a low-calorie-friendly meal that is both romantic and delightful.

ingredients.name: cashews
ingredients.notes: soaked in water for at least 30 minutes

instructions: Place the soaked cashews in a pot and add water. Cover and let them steam for about 10 minutes.
Preheat your pan over medium heat with a few drops of oil added.
Add salt to taste, then toss in the soaked cashews and continue stirring until they start turning golden brown.
Fold in the cinnamon stick once the cashews are well-cooked and heated evenly on all sides.
